name: LicencePermitFollowUp
description: Handles post-approval enquiries about converting a development approval into a licence or permit, including rental licence eligibility.
triggerPhrases: Can I get a licence after approval
Can this approval be used for a rental licence
How do I get a permit after the approval
Can I rent out my granny flat
What happens after my development approval
I want to convert my approval to a licence
Do I need a rental licence
How do I get a rental permit
What licences do I need after building

entities.name: caseNumber
entities.prompt: Do you have your case or application reference number?

entities.name: licenceType
entities.prompt: What type of licence are you enquiring about?

entities.name: intendedUse
entities.prompt: Could you tell me more about what you intend to use the licence for?

actions.description: Trigger Flow-06 to validate eligibility, create a draft licence record, and draft a response.

confirmationMessage: I've checked the licensing pathway for your application. I'll send you an email with the details shortly.
fallbackMessage: I can look into the licensing options for you. Could you share your case number or the address of the property?
